item.title: CrowdStrike Threat Landscape: APTs & Adversary Groups
item.description: Explore your threat landscape by choosing your APTs and Adversary Groups to learn more about them, their origin, target industries and nations.

item.title: Vapor Panda Adversary Profile | CrowdStrike
item.description: Profile VAPOR PANDA is a China-based targeted intrusion adversary CrowdStrike Intelligence initially tracked under the VexatiousTemper activity clu...

item.title: Wicked Panda Adversary Profile | CrowdStrike
item.description: WICKED PANDA has been one the most prolific and effective China-based adversaries from the mid 2010s into the 2020s. They have consistently expande...

item.description: Summary VERTIGO PANDA is China-nexus adversary that has likely been active since at least mid-2020 as a discrete operational group separate from—bu...

item.title: Vault Panda Adversary Profile | CrowdStrike
item.description: VAULT PANDA, an adversary active since at least October 2021, targets the financial services, gambling, technology, academic, defense, and governme...

item.title: Primitive Bear Adversary Profile | CrowdStrike
item.description: PRIMITIVE BEAR is a targeted intrusion adversary operating from Simferopol, Crimea. This group is highly likely attributable to the Federal Securit...

item.title: Ocean Buffalo Adversary Profile | CrowdStrike
item.description: OCEAN BUFFALO is a Vietnam-based targeted intrusion adversary reportedly active since at least 2012. This adversary is known to employ a wide range...

item.title: https://www.crowdstrike.com/en-us/adversaries/ — sitemap had no items
item.description: No items were discoverable via sitemap(s) or they pointed to non-article URLs.
